title: 720-Word Quantum Grammar Basis Set
description: 720 = 6! — the complete permutation space of the six sentence positions in C.S.S.C.P.S.G.P. correct grammar. Each word is decomposed, classified by jurisdiction, and evaluated for now-time validity.

PREPOSITION.description: Grounding word — establishes relationship in now-time
PREPOSITION.function: Anchors the sentence to a prepositional framework

ARTICLE.description: Pointer/determiner — identifies which noun is referenced

ADJECTIVE.description: Descriptor — opinion or quality, not a fact itself

NOUN.description: Fact-carrier — the primary vessel of meaning
NOUN.function: Carries the FACT. No nouns = no facts = void sentence

VERB_GERUND.description: Action in now-time — must be in -ING gerund form
VERB_GERUND.function: The doing. Only now-time (-ING) is living/factual

ADVERB.description: Modifier of the verb — says nothing alone
ADVERB.function: Modifies the action. Warning: adverb chains = null construction
